message:
test(search): implement real integration tests for indexing and hybrid search

Replace the previous skeleton search_integration.rs with comprehensive
tests covering the actual indexing pipeline and search extraction flow.

The new tests exercise:
- Document indexing with tantivy ingest pipeline
- Extraction/retrieval of indexed content by query
- Hybrid search combining full-text and metadata filters
- Edge cases around empty queries and missing indices

This closes a coverage gap where search integration was previously
only stubbed out, leaving the tantivy-backed search path untested
in end-to-end scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
